title: Louis & Luca and the Snow Machine
original_title: Solan og Ludvig - Jul i Flåklypa
overview: The small town of Pinchcliffe is experiencing a great lack of snow, which is why the inventor Reodor Felgen is asked to create a snow machine. However, things do not go as planned.
